## Summary

- Describe the change
- Explain the user-facing or maintainer-facing impact

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope stays focused and does not include unrelated release/versioning changes
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Docs were updated when setup, usage, or contributor workflow changed
- [ ] Any required follow-up work is documented below
